results.author: Ryan-Thomas
results.description:
These are the three best smartphones on the planet. They each have incredibly high end performance specs as you'd expect, but they also pack in huge batteries, stupidly fast charging tech, and camera hardware that makes the iPhone, Galaxy, and Pixel look like toys. This is the Oppo Find X9 Ultra Vs. Vivo X300 Ultra Vs. Xiaomi 17 Ultra.

results.description:

Watch to see which phone comes out on top.
